notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate, right at the hire-ready boundary. Audits all four chapter questions and identifies that the dashboard answers none cleanly. Names four of the four metric principles (activity-vs-outcome, leading-vs-lagging, composition-vs-total, trend-vs-snapshot) with specific replacements. Proposes three-layer split with cadence and owner. Names the persistent-green-as-lie-by-omission pattern with the T. Adeyemi corridor comment as evidence. Both threshold AND PM-override mechanisms mentioned. Coordinator role addresses verify-before-publish, drop noise metrics, refuses to put Federation on dashboard without raising with PM first. Not yet hire-ready because: (a) doesn't reference the 'honest dashboards look slightly uncomfortable' framing explicitly, (b) doesn't address the divergence-between-layers translation discipline, (c) the closing recommendation is bundled rather than tiered into today's-fix vs going-forward.
